{"text":"China has the highest population with **26,340.63 million** people, followed by India with **21,121.50 million** and Indonesia with **4,489.36 million**. The United States also has a significant population of **5,901.33 million**. On the other hand, several countries have very small populations, such as Falkland Islands (Islas Malvinas) with **0.00 million** and Montserrat with **0.11 million**. Other countries with notable populations include Brazil (**3,701.16 million**), Pakistan (**3,191.55 million**), and Nigeria (**2,596.08
